_comment: M9 Track L (L4) frontend perf budgets. Ceilings for the recursive-tree workload the heavy components share, over M9's 2000-node fixture. SEEDED GENEROUSLY (observed baseline ~5-11ms scriptMs / ~1.4-2.5ms longTaskMs on CI-class hardware) so noise never trips the gate; tighten on a clean run (launch calibration, like the online freshness window). nodeCount is deterministic and matched exactly. The `profiling` CI job fails when a metric exceeds its ceiling x tolerance.
